description: Letter mainly in Judaeo-Arabic. From a certain ʿAllāl. Possibly addressed to R. Yiṣḥāq among others. Dating: ca. 15th–17th century. Also mentions R. Shemuel al-[...]. Needs further examination. Same scribe and possibly an indirect join: T-S NS J148 (PGPID 26328) and T-S AS 155.201 (PGPID 17919).
